creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Michael,

there hasn't been an update to this PR for net-p2p/p5-Net-BitTorrent-File
[1] for quite a while. Are you still seeing this problem, or has it been
resolved?

Can you maybe reproduce the problem on non-FreeBSD systems, too? If it's a
bug in the library itself, it should probably be fixed upstream, not in
the ports tree.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/141406
